title: apostello #0649
definition:
1) to order (one) to go to a place appointed
 2) to send away, dismiss
    2a) to allow one to depart, that he may be in a state of
        liberty
    2b) to order one to depart, send off
    2c) to drive away

 Sinonim   : Lihat Definisi \\5813\\
